name: Barbie Life in the City
overview: Turn up the music, put on your dance shoes, and set off on a New York City adventure with Barbie “Brooklyn” Roberts in Barbie: Life In The City! In this exciting mini-series, told from Barbie’s first-person point of view, you’ll discover what inspires her as she takes you to her favorite spots in the city that never sleeps and get to know her family and friends, including her newest friend, Robyn. Get ready, the bright city lights are calling! #LifeInTheCity

trailers.title: Barbie Life In The City | OFFICIAL TRAILER!
